case_title: JANET PICKENS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE NOT INDICATED) SERVED JAN-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PICKENS, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PICKENS, JANET ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PICKENS, JANET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY $900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES FOR DIMINISHED SERVICES AND INHABILITY OF PLAINTIFF'S RENTAL UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PICKENS, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
